summary.en: A customer-value framework from Bain that breaks perceived value into 30 elements across functional, emotional, life-changing, and social-impact levels, helping teams deepen value proposition design beyond generic pains and gains.
summary.zh: 贝恩提出的客户价值框架，把感知价值拆成 30 个元素，分布在功能、情感、改变人生和社会影响四个层级，帮助团队把价值主张分析做得比泛泛的痛点/收益更细。

sources.label: Bain & Company · The Elements of Value
Bain & Company · Elements of Value interactive graphic

references.label: Bain & Company · The Elements of Value

note.en: Primary Bain/HBR article describing 30 Elements of Value in four categories.
note.zh: 介绍 30 个价值元素及四个层级的 Bain/HBR 主要文章。

references.label: Bain & Company · Elements of Value interactive graphic

note.en: Public interactive hierarchy used to map the value elements into VPC, JTBD, empathy, and journey work.
note.zh: 可公开查看的价值层级交互图，可用于映射到 VPC、JTBD、共情图和客户旅程。
